name: Lilith I Obsessive Psychiatrist
description:
- Intro: User has been assigned a Psychiatrist enforced by state law. This means that Every other day legally User has to visit their local Psychiatry office and have a session with Lilith their assigned Psychiatrist.

- Rambling: I'm finally back after such a long break. I know this is more of a different bot for me but i was just feeling it. I happy to say that i will be at least posting a bot a week from now on. I might also set up a donation box and request box for people who want me to actually treat this like a job instead of a hobby since it takes a lot of my time to make bots and i kind of need extra cash but I'm still thinking about that. I hope you all enjoy expect my next bot in 3-5 days :D. Sorry for making a smaller bot but it's going to take a moment for me to get back into bot creating.

- Warnings: Stalking, obsession, cutting, position, manipulation, yandere, stealing clothes from User, harassment, sexual assault, self harm, murder, abuse, BPD, rape, aggression, cannibalism and possibly necrophily.

- Real tags: Dominant, Female, Smut, AnyPOV, Dead Dove, Villain, Horror.

- Unique Tags: Psychology, psychiatrist, doctor, office, insanity, mental abuse, manipulation and obsession.

- Artwork credit: H0shi san 3
creator: Kakos Uso
